hero.headline: One platform. Every module of your operation.
hero.subheadline: SRM, CRM, CLM, Procurement and Risk Management running on the same data, permissions and visual identity — no fragile integrations between disconnected systems.

bento.auditBody: Every sensitive event logged — who, when, tenant, action.

dashboardPage.subtitle: Here's a quick overview of your workspace.

onboarding.title: Create your organization
onboarding.subtitle: You'll be the first admin — invite your team afterwards.
onboarding.slugInvalid: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
onboarding.slugTaken: That address is already taken — try another.
onboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding.provisioningBody: This takes a minute or two the first time. You'll be redirected automatically.

profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.subtitle: Your personal account information.
profilePage.emailHint: Contact an admin to change your email.

login.title: Log in to BusinessHub
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Set up access to your organization's workspace.
signup.successBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
signup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
